title: scripts/closed_loop.py (not yet created)
body: The single-module rebuild. Should expose State, step(state) → state', and a CLI to run to fixed point. Status: not yet implemented. Blocked on resolving open questions q-tau-sigma-wedge-combinator, q-wedge-articulation-signal, q-weight-gradient-direction before the step() function can be specified precisely enough to implement.

title: scripts/design_sppf.py
body: SPPF walker for the design/ directory. Reads principles.jsonl, decisions.jsonl, rejected.jsonl, corrections.jsonl, questions.jsonl, artifacts.jsonl. Commands: index (full catalog), show <id>, deps <id>, dependents <id>, questions, principles, list <type>. Allows future sessions to load a minimal design slice without paging in the whole history.

title: design/*.jsonl (SPPF seed files)
body: Initial seed of the SPPF with the principles, decisions, rejections, corrections, and open questions established through the session history up to 2026-04-15. Subsequent sessions append to these files rather than reinstantiating the history in conversation.

title: reports/ and reports/structural/ (prior-run outputs)
body: Prior multi-stage pipeline's outputs: reports/ (lexical mode, 101 committed triples, 71.3% citation agreement) and reports/structural/ (structural-only mode, 0 triples, demonstrating that without lexical signal the three-source grammar vocabularies are essentially disjoint at the tag-name grain). These exist for comparison against the closed-loop rebuild; they are not inputs to the new loop.
